nasb.text: Now if He were on earth, He would not be a priest at all, since there are those who offer the gifts according to the Law;

esv.text: Now if he were on earth, he would not be a priest at all, since there are priests who offer gifts according to the law.

cnv.text: 如果他在地上，就不會作祭司，因為已經有按照律法獻禮物的祭司了。

ccb.text: 祂如果是在地上，根本不会做祭司，因为地上已经有照律法向上帝献礼物的祭司了。

csbs.text: 既然如此，如果他在地上，就不会做祭司，因为地上已经有照着律法献祭物的祭司。
